message:
feat(v2): core implementation — agent loop, 14 tools, streaming, MCP, hooks, context

Implement the complete v2 runtime:
- Enhanced agent loop with streaming, thinking blocks, auto-compaction,
  stop hooks, system prompt loading, and multi-provider support
  (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google)
- 8 new tools: Agent, WebFetch, WebSearch, TodoWrite, NotebookEdit,
  MultiEdit, LS, ToolSearch (14 total)
- SSE streaming handler with event accumulation
- MCP client with stdio transport (JSON-RPC)
- Hook engine (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop, Notification)
- Context manager with token tracking and auto-compaction
- Interactive REPL with slash commands
- 120 passing tests covering all modules

Closes #1, #2, #3, #5, #6, #8

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>
